body: The requested cleanup is blocked by the currently published `github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` releases. `go list -m -versions github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` stops at `v0.10.7`, and the local module cache for `v0.10.7` still defines `ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames`, `ModelRouteCandidates`, and `ModelRouteConfig` in `service.go`, so removing the compatibility stubs in `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go` would break compilation without a newer upstream release or an approved replacement module path. verified: - `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestAgentRouteStatus -count=1` - `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFormatSessionLogLines|TestTailSessionLogs' -count=1` - `rg -n 'model_routes|ModelRoute|model route|route key|No model routes|Requested model route' cli/cmd cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_agent_route-status.md` follow_up_needed: Publish or identify a `fizeau` release that removes the `ModelRoute*` methods from `ServiceConfig`, then bump `cli/go.mod` and delete the stub methods from `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go`.

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested cleanup is blocked by the currently published `github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` releases. `go list -m -versions github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` stops at `v0.10.7`, and the local module cache for `v0.10.7` still defines `ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames`, `ModelRouteCandidates`, and `ModelRouteConfig` in `service.go`, so removing the compatibility stubs in `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go` would break compilation without a newer upstream release or an approved replacement module path.

verified:
- `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run TestAgentRouteStatus -count=1`
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestFormatSessionLogLines|TestTailSessionLogs' -count=1`
- `rg -n 'model_routes|ModelRoute|model route|route key|No model routes|Requested model route' cli/cmd cli/internal/agent cli/internal/server website/content/docs/cli/commands/ddx_agent_route-status.md`

follow_up_needed: Publish or identify a `fizeau` release that removes the `ModelRoute*` methods from `ServiceConfig`, then bump `cli/go.mod` and delete the stub methods from `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go`.

retry_after=2026-05-05T07:56:56Z

> The requested cleanup depends on an upstream Fizeau release that removes ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames, ModelRouteCandidates, and ModelRouteConfig without changing the rest of the public DDx-facing API. I inspected the accessible upstream versions and found: - cli/go.mod currently pins github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau v0.10.7. - v0.10.7 still defines ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames/ModelRouteCandidates/ ModelRouteConfig in service.go. - The only newer reachable upstream ref is main at commit 5da7640e7522a64837abcd8c43ae712b78467f1e, but that ref is a different package shape (module root package forge) and does not expose the current DDx API surface such as FizeauService, ServiceOptions, ServiceExecuteRequest, or ServiceEvent. - The route-status command still needs the live provider/model inventory and ResolveRoute preview, so removing the shim methods in cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go without a compatible upstream contract would break compilation. Follow-up needed: - Identify or publish a Fizeau release/commit that removes only the ServiceConfig model-route methods while preserving the DDx-used API surface. - Then delete the compatibility methods from cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go and bump cli/go.mod/go.sum to that compatible version. Evidence: - cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go:306-315 - cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go:388-470 - cli/cmd/agent_route_status_test.go:13-132

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
reason: >
  The requested cleanup depends on an upstream Fizeau release that removes
  ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames, ModelRouteCandidates, and ModelRouteConfig
  without changing the rest of the public DDx-facing API. I inspected the
  accessible upstream versions and found:
  - cli/go.mod currently pins github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau v0.10.7.
  - v0.10.7 still defines ServiceConfig.ModelRouteNames/ModelRouteCandidates/
    ModelRouteConfig in service.go.
  - The only newer reachable upstream ref is main at commit
    5da7640e7522a64837abcd8c43ae712b78467f1e, but that ref is a different
    package shape (module root package forge) and does not expose the current
    DDx API surface such as FizeauService, ServiceOptions, ServiceExecuteRequest,
    or ServiceEvent.
  - The route-status command still needs the live provider/model inventory and
    ResolveRoute preview, so removing the shim methods in
    cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go without a compatible upstream contract
    would break compilation.

Follow-up needed:
  - Identify or publish a Fizeau release/commit that removes only the
    ServiceConfig model-route methods while preserving the DDx-used API
    surface.
  - Then delete the compatibility methods from
    cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go and bump cli/go.mod/go.sum to that
    compatible version.

Evidence:
  - cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go:306-315
  - cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go:388-470
  - cli/cmd/agent_route_status_test.go:13-132

The bead asks to remove cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go's ModelRoute* compatibility methods after bumping cli/go.mod to a Fizeau release whose ServiceConfig interface no longer requires them, but the newest published github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau version available through Go and git tags is still v0.10.7. In this workspace, `go list -m -json github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau@latest` resolves to v0.10.7, `git ls-remote --tags https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/fizeau` shows no tag newer than v0.10.7, and the v0.10.7 ServiceConfig in service.go still declares ModelRouteNames, ModelRouteCandidates, and ModelRouteConfig. Removing the methods here without a matching upstream interface bump would break compilation.

no_changes
